# devin_organization (Resource)

Manages a Devin organization within an enterprise.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "devin_organization" "frontend" {
  name                  = "Frontend Team"
  max_session_acu_limit = 200
}

resource "devin_organization" "backend" {
  name                  = "Backend Team"
  max_session_acu_limit = 500
  max_cycle_acu_limit   = 2000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the organization.

### Optional

- `max_cycle_acu_limit` (Number) Maximum ACU limit per cycle.
- `max_session_acu_limit` (Number) Maximum ACU limit per session. Defaults to a server-side value when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `org_id` (String) Organization ID (assigned by Devin).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Organizations are imported by org ID.
terraform import devin_organization.frontend org-389d2d5c48cd40149f0c8401a7197e70
```
